name: Grapefruit Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the cake flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt into a bowl.
2. Make a well in the center and add water, oil, egg yolks, grapefruit juice, and 1/2 teaspoon lemon peel. Beat until very smooth.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites with cream of tartar until stiff but not dry.
4. Gradually pour the egg yolk mixture into the egg white mixture and fold in gently until just blended. Do not stir.
5. Turn the batter into an ungreased 9-inch springform pan and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until the top springs back when touched lightly with a finger.
6. Invert onto a rack and cool thoroughly.
7. To make the frosting, beat the cream cheese until fluffy. Add lemon juice and 1 teaspoon grated lemon peel. Gradually blend in powdered sugar and beat until well blended. Stir in yellow food coloring (optional).
8. Crush enough grapefruit sections to measure 2 teaspoons and blend into the frosting.
9. Loosen the edges of the cake carefully and remove from the pan. With a serrated knife, cut the cake crosswise to make two layers.
10. Fill one layer with part of the frosting and some of the grapefruit sections. Spread the top and sides of the cake with frosting and decorate with the remaining fruit sections.
